payload.geographicIdNote: Sibling lot resolved via get_place_layers parcel layer; the canonical Travis CAD geographic ID materializes when the place-layer parcel atomDid is fetched against the live Place API. Held as a stable local id until then.

provenance.produced: placeKey + jurisdiction_key for 607 Nelray from address geocode
provenance.note: The listing 607-611 Nelray spans three contiguous lots. resolve_place geocodes 607 Nelray to its own placeKey.

provenance.produced: parcel layer ref (atomDid + asOf) for the 607 lot
provenance.citation: Rocket Homes listing 607-611 Nelray (three contiguous lots); Travis Central Appraisal District parcel layer via place substrate.

reasoning: Second of the three contiguous listing lots. Per docs/property_ground_truth.md the listing spans 607, 609/611 Nelray and only parcel 226623 (situs 611) is operator-confirmed; resolving the remaining two lots is the WS-1 substrate task. This atom represents the 607 lot resolved through resolve_place + get_place_layers. The Travis CAD geographic ID is held as a stable local id (TBD-SUBSTRATE-RESOLVED) and backfilled from the parcel-layer atomDid when the live Place API (PLACE_API_ENABLED) is reachable; values are not hand-faked against the substrate.

confidence.stateNote: Lot identity and assemblage membership are substrate-resolved from the listing + place layer but not operator-confirmed; the geographic ID is pending live Place-API fetch. Baseline, provenance-backed, not earned-calibrated.
